items.description: Repo scaffold: SPM skeleton, build.sh, verify.sh, signed app launches
Pure state machine + full Checks scenario suite green
Curtain + escapes + safety mechanics + LocalAuthentication restore (simulated source)
Policy schema + 9-step validation + storage + preview/approve UI + TemplatePolicyCompiler
Camera pipeline + Perception layer + HUD + simulator mode
Tier 2 in order: additional-viewer, app hiding (post-spike), displaysOff, Flow F, onboarding
Review passes, docs, secret scan, publication, release, submission package
Click Allow on the one-time camera TCC dialog (Checkpoint 1)
One real Touch ID curtain-unlock to confirm LocalAuthentication live
Capture fixture photos: empty room / one person / two people
Execute DEMO.md manual on-camera checklist; film; upload to YouTube (Public)
Submit on Devpost with Codex Session ID (agent never submits)
